# Go Kilimanjaro Treks

> Expert-guided Mount Kilimanjaro climbs and Tanzania safaris, led by Nelson Mushi, a Machame-born Tanzanian guide with 22+ years on the mountain, 270+ personal summits to Uhuru Peak, and a 100% safety record. Based in Moshi, Tanzania, serving climbers and safari travelers worldwide.

Go Kilimanjaro Treks is an independently owned Tanzanian tour operator. Owner and lead guide Nelson Mushi grew up in the Machame ward on the southern slopes of Kilimanjaro and has guided 8 different Kilimanjaro routes. The company runs full Kilimanjaro expeditions on the Lemosho, Northern Circuit, Marangu, Rongai, Umbwe, and Machame routes; multi-day Tanzania safaris across the Serengeti, Ngorongoro Crater, Tarangire, Lake Manyara, Arusha National Park, and Zanzibar; and single-day excursions from Moshi and Arusha. Contact: info@gokilimanjarotreks.com, +255 677 917 500, WhatsApp at https://wa.me/255677917500.

## Kilimanjaro climbing

- [Kilimanjaro routes and packages](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/kilimanjaro): Detailed breakdown of the six Kilimanjaro trekking routes Go Kilimanjaro Treks operates (Lemosho 7-day, Northern Circuit 9-10 day, Marangu 5-6 day, Rongai 7-day, Umbwe 6-day, Machame 7 or 8-day with Moir Hut variant) with success rates, scenery, day-by-day itineraries, and best-fit climber profiles.
- [Compare Kilimanjaro routes](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/compare-routes): Side-by-side comparison table of all routes by duration, success rate, scenery, crowds, difficulty, and best-fit climber.
- [Kilimanjaro packing list](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/packing-list): Full gear guide by category (documents, clothing layers, head/hands/feet, sleeping, daypack, medical, summit night, what NOT to bring, renting in Moshi).
- [Kilimanjaro training plan](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/training-plan): 12-week and 6-week training schedules, strength sessions, cardio progression, mental preparation, common mistakes.
- [Choose a Kilimanjaro operator](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/choose-operator): 10 questions to ask, red flags from cut-price operators, green flags from credible operators, why-us section.

## Tanzania safaris

- [Tanzania safari packages and destinations](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safari): Destination overview (Serengeti, Ngorongoro Crater, Tarangire, Lake Manyara, Zanzibar, Arusha National Park) and the safari experience with Go Kilimanjaro Treks. Custom itineraries available.
- [Safari itineraries catalogue](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safaris): All multi-day Tanzania safari itineraries, each with day-by-day plans, parks visited, accommodation, and inclusions.
- [Northern Tanzania destinations master guide](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/destinations): In-depth reference for ten northern Tanzania destinations: Mount Kilimanjaro NP, Serengeti NP, Ngorongoro Conservation Area, Tarangire NP, Lake Manyara NP, Lake Eyasi, Lake Natron, Arusha NP, Mkomazi NP, and Mount Meru. Quick facts, overview, wildlife profile, history, and FAQs for each.

### Individual safari itineraries

- [3-Day Safari: Tarangire and Ngorongoro](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safaris/3-day-tarangire-ngorongoro)
- [3-Day Safari: Serengeti and Ngorongoro](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safaris/3-day-serengeti-ngorongoro)
- [4-Day Northern Circuit Safari](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safaris/4-day-northern-circuit)
- [4-Day Safari: Tarangire, Serengeti, Ngorongoro](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safaris/4-day-tarangire-serengeti-ngorongoro)
- [5-Day Safari: Tarangire, Serengeti, Ngorongoro](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safaris/5-day-tarangire-serengeti-ngorongoro)
- [5+2 Day Safari and Zanzibar](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safaris/5-plus-2-day-safari-zanzibar)
- [6-Day Northern Tanzania Safari](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safaris/6-day-northern-tanzania)
- [7-Day Classic Tanzania Safari](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safaris/7-day-classic-safari)
- [8-Day Grand Safari](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safaris/8-day-grand-safari)
- [10-Day Tanzania Safari](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safaris/10-day-tanzania-safari)
- [14-Day Tanzania Safari](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safaris/14-day-tanzania-safari)

## Day trips

- [Tanzania day trips from Moshi and Arusha](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/daytrips): Single-day adventures with starting prices, full itineraries, and inclusions. Tarangire safari, Materuni waterfall and coffee, Arusha NP safari, Ol Doinyo Lengai volcano trek, Kilimanjaro helicopter tour, Lake Chala hike, Ndarakwai Ranch walking safari, Chemka Hot Springs, Kilimanjaro day hike to Mandara Huts, horseback riding, Arusha cultural shopping tour.
- [Tarangire National Park day trip](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/daytrips/tarangire): Full-day game drive in Tarangire, famous for its elephant herds and baobab trees.
- [Ngorongoro Crater day trip](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/daytrips/ngorongoro): Full-day descent into the Ngorongoro Crater, the world's largest intact volcanic caldera and a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
- [Arusha National Park day trip](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/daytrips/arusha-national-park): Day safari on the slopes of Mount Meru with Momela Lakes, Ngurdoto Crater, and walking-safari options.

## Plan your trip

- [Safety and rescue protocols](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/safety): Two-hour assessment protocol, per-route helicopter evacuation points, KCMC hospital partnership, KiliMedAir rescue costs, mandatory insurance requirements, WFR-certified guides.
- [Tanzania travel guide](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/travel-guide): Visa walk-through, vaccinations, JRO airport, Tanzanian Shilling, plastic bag ban (2019), filming permits, drone laws.
- [Glacier tour](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/glacier-tour): Optional post-summit detour to the Heim Glacier viewpoints, equipment conditions matrix, climate change context.

## Group, corporate, and charity climbs

- [Corporate team climbs](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/corporate-climbs): Leadership offsites and team-building expeditions on Kilimanjaro for companies. The CEO and the analyst share the same tent; everyone reaches the summit on the same rope of trust. Group rates, planning support, and full safety credentials.
- [Charity fundraising climbs](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/charity-climbs): Sponsored Kilimanjaro climbs for registered charities, school and university groups, corporate CSR programmes, in-memory climbs, and self-funded fundraisers. Group-friendly per-climber rates, fundraising toolkit, summit photo and video coverage, full safety credentials.

## Blog

- [Go Kilimanjaro Treks blog](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/blog): Practical climbing advice and Kilimanjaro stories from Nelson and the team. Topics include fitness benchmarks, Diamox and altitude, temperature ranges, best months to climb, summit night, pole pole pacing, climbing with kids, the Karanga to Barafu shortcut, remaining glaciers, rainy-season climbing, Lemosho vs Machame, the Barranco Wall and Kissing Rock, Chagga coffee culture, the Serengeti wildebeest migration, and the best time for a Tanzania safari.

## Photo gallery

- [Photo gallery](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/gallery): Original photography from Mount Kilimanjaro climbs and northern Tanzania safaris. Categorised view (Routes, Crew, Camps, Mountains, Glacier, Safari, Culture, Day Trips, Climbers) with lightbox viewer. Photos by Nelson Mushi and Go Kilimanjaro Treks climbers.

## Stories and reviews

- [Climber stories](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/stories): Verified reviews and testimonials from past Kilimanjaro climbers and Tanzania safari clients. Links to Google Business Profile and TripAdvisor reviews.

## Our giveback

- [Faith Vision Foundation](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/faith-vision-foundation): A children's vision care foundation Nelson Mushi is building in the Kilimanjaro region, supported by a portion of every Go Kilimanjaro Treks climb and safari. Named after his daughter Faith. Includes the story of why Nelson started the foundation, what it will do, and how every booking contributes.

## Travel agency partnerships

- [Travel agency partners](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/partners): Net-rate partnership programme for travel agencies, adventure tour operators, university programmes, corporate group travel, charity climb organisers, and professional film crews. Direct ground-operator relationship from Moshi, marketing assets library, 24-hour quote turnaround, dedicated partner contact (Nelson Mushi). No annual minimum or exclusivity.

## About the guide

- [About Nelson Mushi](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/about): Lead guide bio. Machame-born Chagga, 22+ years on Kilimanjaro, 270+ personal summits to Uhuru Peak, registered Tanzania National Parks (TANAPA) guide with Wilderness First Aid certification. Pioneered the Karanga to Barafu shortcut now used across the mountain. Specializes in family and group expeditions, including climbers as young as 15.

## Contact and booking

- [Contact and enquiry form](https://gokilimanjarotreks.com/contact): Free consultation and custom quote. Phone +255 677 917 500, email info@gokilimanjarotreks.com, WhatsApp https://wa.me/255677917500. Nelson responds personally within 24 hours.
